metadata.title: Ring My Bel (Re-Recorded - Extended Mix)
metadata.lyrics:
[01:01.27] I'm glad you're home
[01:05.02] Well, did you really miss me?
[01:08.95] I guess you did by the look in your eye
[01:15.38] (Look in your eye, look in your eye)
[01:16.34] Well, lay back and relax while I put away the dishes
[01:24.09] Then you and me can rock a bell
[01:30.95] You can ring my be-e-ell, ring my bell
[01:38.66] You can ring my be-e-ell, ring my bell
[01:46.31] You can ring my be-e-ell, ring my bell
[01:54.08] You can ring my be-e-ell, ring my bell
[02:02.77] The night is young and full of possibilities
[02:10.19] Well, come on and let yourself be free
[02:17.91] My love for you so long I've been savin'
[02:25.60] Tonight was made for me and you
[02:32.42] You can ring my be-e-ell,
[02:36.69] Ring my bell (ring my bell, ding-dong-ding)
[02:40.16] You can ring my be-e-ell,
[02:44.42] Ring my bell (ring my bell, ring-a-ling-a-ling)
[02:49.33] You can ring my be-e-ell,
[02:52.35] Ring my bell (ring my bell, ding-dong-ding)
[02:55.40] You can ring my be-e-ell,
[02:59.81] Ring my bell (ring my bell, ring-a-ling-a-ling)
[03:20.34] (You can ring my bell, you can ring my bell
[03:23.70] Ding, dong, ding, ah-ah, ring it!
[03:27.94] You can ring my bell, anytime, anywhere
[03:31.42] Ring it, ring it, ring it, ring it, oww!
[03:35.57] You can ring my bell, you can ring my bell
[03:39.11] Ding, dong, ding, ah-ah, ring it!
[03:43.23] You can ring my bell, anytime, anywhere
[03:46.82] Ring it, ring it, ring it, ring it, oww!)
[03:50.03] You can ring my be-e-ell, ring my bell
[03:54.91] (Ring my bell, ding-dong-ding)
[03:56.94] You can ring my be-e-ell, ring my bell
[04:02.68] (Ring my bell, ring-a-ling-a-ling)
[04:04.20] You can ring my be-e-ell, ring my bell
[04:10.38] (Ring my bell, ding-dong-ding)
[04:12.58] You can ring my be-e-ell, ring my bell
[04:17.45] (Ring my bell, ring-a-ling-a-ling)

[05:57.45] Ding, dong, ding, ah-ah, ring it!
